x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: VA analytics provide the performance data Now Assist uses to identify improvement opportunities and measure AI self-service impact.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Set com.glide.cs.analytics.enabled=true in sys_properties. Review VA dashboards weekly. Track deflection rate, containment, and top topics. Now Assist impact is measured through VA analytics.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c1d
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[VA analytics provide the performance data Now Assist uses to identify improvement opportunities and measure AI self-service impact.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>VA Analytics Configuration</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_properties');
    gr.addQuery('name', 'com.glide.cs.analytics.enabled');
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();

    var exists = gr.next();
    var value = exists ? gr.getValue('value') : null;
    var enabled = value === 'true';

    var actualValue = 'VA analytics enabled: ' + enabled;

    if (enabled) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'VA analytics is enabled. Now Assist VA self-service impact is being measured — deflection rate, containment, and top topics are tracked.'
        };
    } else if (!exists) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: 'VA analytics property not set (com.glide.cs.analytics.enabled)',
            finding: 'VA analytics property has not been configured. Enable VA analytics to measure Now Assist self-service impact and identify AI improvement opportunities.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'VA analytics is explicitly disabled. Enable VA analytics to measure Now Assist self-service impact and identify AI improvement opportunities.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>VIRTUAL_AGENT</module>
<number>CHK0006133</number>
<order>80</order>
<remediation_guidance>Set com.glide.cs.analytics.enabled=true in sys_properties. Review VA dashboards weekly. Track deflection rate, containment, and top topics. Now Assist impact is measured through VA analytics.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>8e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c1d</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
